previewText: Posting frequency depends on platform, resources, and quality standards. Choose a cadence…
intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: How Often Should You Post on Social Media?. Posting frequency depends on platform, resources, and quality standards. Choose a cadence you can sustain with strong creative rather than chasing maximal volume.
mainSummary: Posting frequency depends on platform, resources, and quality standards. Choose a cadence you can sustain with strong creative rather than chasing maximal volume.
keyTakeaways: Adjust by platform, not one rule
